list.name: Changes
list.comment:
Update README with project structure and usage details
Added instructions on project setup, usage steps, and handling HATS data files. Included a link to a shared Drive folder with example data and reports for improved clarity. This enhances usability and setup guidance for the project.

task.summary:
Add hats_report_v2.py and project setup files
Introduce the main script for processing HATS files, `hats_report_v2.py`, with support for parsing, reporting, and exporting data. Update project structure with configuration files, a README, and a .gitignore for clarity and organization.

Add JSON report files for processed data on 2026-03-17 and 2026-03-18
Added detailed JSON reports summarizing processed data, including file types, statistics, and sampled records for both dates. Created a summary.json file to group metadata and overall report information.

Add JSON reports and update .gitignore
Added JSON report files summarizing processed data for specified dates, including metadata and statistics. Updated `.gitignore` to exclude the `/Data/` directory for better project organization.

Add JSON reports and update .gitignore
Added JSON report files summarizing processed data for specified dates, including metadata and statistics. Updated `.gitignore` to exclude the `/Data/` directory for better project organization.

Update README with project structure and usage instructions
Added detailed project structure, usage steps, and clarification on handling HATS data files. This improves clarity for setting up and using the project.

Update README with project structure and usage instructions
Added detailed project structure, usage steps, and clarification on handling HATS data files. This improves clarity for setting up and using the project.

Update README with project structure and usage details
Added instructions on project setup, usage steps, and handling HATS data files. Included a link to a shared Drive folder with example data and reports for improved clarity. This enhances usability and setup guidance for the project.

MESSAGE.value:
Add hats_report_v2.py and project setup files
Introduce the main script for processing HATS files, `hats_report_v2.py`, with support for parsing, reporting, and exporting data. Update project structure with configuration files, a README, and a .gitignore for clarity and organization.

Add JSON report files for processed data on 2026-03-17 and 2026-03-18
Added detailed JSON reports summarizing processed data, including file types, statistics, and sampled records for both dates. Created a summary.json file to group metadata and overall report information.

Add JSON reports and update .gitignore
Added JSON report files summarizing processed data for specified dates, including metadata and statistics. Updated `.gitignore` to exclude the `/Data/` directory for better project organization.

Update README with project structure and usage instructions
Added detailed project structure, usage steps, and clarification on handling HATS data files. This improves clarity for setting up and using the project.

Update README with project structure and usage details
Added instructions on project setup, usage steps, and handling HATS data files. Included a link to a shared Drive folder with example data and reports for improved clarity. This enhances usability and setup guidance for the project.

option.name: LAST_COMMIT_MESSAGE
option.value:
Update README with project structure and usage details
Added instructions on project setup, usage steps, and handling HATS data files. Included a link to a shared Drive folder with example data and reports for improved clarity. This enhances usability and setup guidance for the project.
